article_items.description: [HIGH] Lloyds Banking Group to hire 300 tech experts to work on AI Company : The Guardian Tech Summary : Exclusive: While recruits will increase headcount for now, broader adoption of AI could lead to jobs cuts in future Lloyds Banking Group has launched an AI recruitment drive for 300 tech experts, week Link :
